title: selago monticola
intro: Selago monticola, also known as mountain smoke, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Selago monticola include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selago monticola can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
